subcodes.first_line: We have sent forth 'Alí before Nabíl to herald unto all this Manifestation that was promised in the Books of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ارسلنا علیا قبل نبیل لیبشر الکل بهذا الظهور الذی کان موعودا فی کتب الله
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
